scripts.vercel-build: (cd server && pnpm exec prisma generate) && pnpm -r build && mkdir -p public/tracker public/captain public/manager public/driver && cp -r apps/tracker/dist/. public/tracker && cp -r apps/captain/dist/. public/captain && cp -r apps/manager/dist/. public/manager && cp -r apps/driver/dist/. public/driver && (cd server && pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy)
